headline: Does Hershey’s 2026 Reaffirmed Outlook And Recipe Shift Change The Bull Case For HSY?
summary: At its recent investor day, The Hershey Company reaffirmed its 2026 outlook, including mid-single-digit net and organic sales growth and very large reported earnings per share growth, while outlining its “ONE Hershey” commercial model and productivity plans. The company also committed to reverting Reese’s to its classic recipe and moving major brands toward natural colors by 2027, underscoring how consumer backlash and brand heritage are directly influencing Hershey’s product and ingredient...
